response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like systems (e.g., DLang, real-time apps)
Active contributor to open-source and developer tooling with strong testing and CI/CD practices
concerns: No C programming experience in UNIX/embedded contexts as required
Zero evidence of Linux kernel analysis, modification, or embedded networking security work
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of security networking tech exposure
